SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web

Class DashboardController

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web.DashboardController
@RestController @RequestMapping("${failover.dashboard.base-path:/failover-dashboard}/api") public class DashboardController extends Object
Read-only JSON API for the dashboard. All endpoints are GET — the dashboard never mutates runtime state (design doc §9).

The base path resolves the failover.dashboard.base-path property (default /failover-dashboard) so the API tracks the configured UI path.

Serves the scanner-derived views that need no MeterRegistry: /api/config (every @Failover point + global settings) and /api/failover-health (actuator-style overall status). The metrics views live on DashboardMetricsController.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Details

    • config

      @GetMapping("/config") public List<ConfigEntry> config()

    • settings

      @GetMapping("/config/settings") public Map<String,Map<String,String>> settings()
      Effective global failover.* / failover.dashboard.* settings, grouped for display. Path lives under /config so the exposure interceptor gates it with the config view.

    • failoverHealth

      @GetMapping("/failover-health") public FailoverHealth failoverHealth()
